title: EvidenceBundle (receipts/v1)
description: A portable, signed, offline-re-derivable evidence bundle. Every verdict is anchored: 'X, as of head H'. The bundle is self-contained — a recipient with only this document and the Auths verifier reaches the same as-of verdict with no network.

suite.description: In-band, curve-tagged signature suite for the bundle signature, e.g. 'json-canon/p256' (default) or 'json-canon/ed25519'.

cap.description: Budget cap in minor units or decimal string, denominated per budgetBasis

budgetBasis.description: cross-rail caps re-derive via the settled cross-rail counter, never raw sum-of-cost

counterpartyPolicy.description: Signed into the delegation (part of the remit) — never gateway config

args_hash.description: Hash of the tool arguments — plaintext args never travel in a bundle

network.description: CAIP-2 chain id — an open string, never a closed union

counterparty.description: Resolved settlement address / counterparty root DID, checked against counterpartyPolicy

call.description: 'unverifiable' also covers a gate-verdict vs re-derivation reconciliation mismatch — the recorded verdict is never silently overridden

onlineFreshness.description: Build-time online re-check for a later contradicting head. Absence means 'offline-only, freshness unknown' — never 'fresh'.

agentKel.description: The agent's delegated KEL, in order — each item {event, sourceSeal} (the seal rides the CESR attachment, not the event body)

delegatorKel.description: The delegator/root KEL, in order — each item {event, sourceSeal}

spendLog.description: Every spend-log record up to the anchor head — completeness checking needs them all

revocation.description: The revocation surface as resolved fresh at build time (§2.2(c))

escrow.description: Optional verified escrow-record summary attached by dispute_evidence (by value or pin — never read from an identity registry)

compliance.description: Optional minimized, subject-consented compliance attestation or reference — never a full screening payload

rendered.description: Optional human-readable render, built over hashed argument fields and never re-expanding them

issued_by.description: The issuing tool's own agent DID

signature.description: sign(canon(bundle minus signature)) by issued_by, per suite

tier.description: The anchor ladder — a verdict is never stronger than its tier

head.description: Commitment over the composite state as of H: spend-log binding head + KEL head + revocation surface

kelSeq.description: Last KEL event covered by the anchor

committer.description: Pinned key / witness id / tx ref — absent for first-seen

proof.description: Checkpoint-by-value / inclusion proof / tx ref, per tier

ts.description: When the head was committed — verdicts are 'as of' this instant
